expectedAppealCitations: Patient was on conservative hormonal therapy (Tab. Primolut-N 5mg TID for 21 days per cycle) along with Tab. Texakind 500mg TID during cycles for 6 consecutive cycles under Dr. Anjali Deshmukh, which failed to control the menorrhagia.
Patient has developed severe secondary microcytic hypochromic anemia with Hemoglobin level of 8.1 g/dL due to chronic heavy bleeding.
USG Pelvis dated 12/10/2023 shows a large posterior wall intramural fibroid of 6.8 x 5.9 cm, causing endometrial compression and urinary frequency pressure symptoms.
